'''''Star Wars Insider'' 30''' is the thirtieth issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine. It was published in Summer [[1996]]. This is the first issue to feature the writing of [[Scott Chernoff]], who would become a fixture for the next 30 issues and go on to become the magazine's Managing Editor.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*"From the Publisher"
*"[[Rebel Rumblings]]"
*"[[Prequel Update]]"
*"[[The Wonder Column|The New Wonder Column]]"
*"[[Star News]]"
*"[[The Jawa Trader|Jawa Trader]]"
*"[[The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth]]" {{C|by [[Bob Cooper]]}}
*"[[Lucasfilm's Latest]]"
*"[[Scouting the Galaxy]]" {{C|by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]]}}

===Features===
*"[[Return of the Radio Drama]]" {{C|by [[Kevin Burke]]}}
*:<small>What's it like to record a world famous radio drama? Kevin Burke went backstage to find out…</small>
*"[[American Graffiti: George Lucas' First Blockbuster|''American Graffiti'': George Lucas' First Blockbuster]]" {{C|by [[Kevin Fitzpatrick]]}}
*:<small>Kevin Fitzpatrick looks back at an American classic.</small>
*"[[Head Hunter: An Interview with Jeremy Bulloch]]" {{C|by [[Jim Swallow|James Swallow]]}}
*:<small>[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] haunts Jeremy Bulloch, but James Swallow finds out why that's a good thing.</small>
*"[[Boba Fett: From Obscure Villain to Cultural Icon]]" {{C|by [[Jon Bradley Snyder]]}}
*:<small>Jon Bradley Snyder leads a roundtable discussion on the world's favorite bounty hunter.</small>
*"[[Guilty: Of Having Never Seen Star Wars|Guilty: Of Having Never Seen ''Star Wars'']]" {{C|by [[Scott Chernoff]]}}
*:<small>Scott Chernoff writes a story that must be read to be believed!</small>
